name: Sonny Parker
description: American blues and jazz singer, dancer, and drummer (1925-1957)
abstract: Willis "Sonny" Parker (May 5, 1925 or October 29, 1926 – February 7, 1957) was an American blues and jazz singer, dancer, and drummer.

concerts.label: Midnight Performance: Pittsburgh Courier Charity Fund's 7th Annual Concert

about_quotes.speaker: Al Grey
about_quotes.evidence: Many years ago when I was with Lionel Hampton they had a blues singer, Sonny Parker
about_quotes.doc_title: Al Grey interviewed by Michael Woods, Scottsdale, Arizona, March 3, 1995

about_quotes.speaker: Monk Montgomery
about_quotes.evidence: Sonny Parker... was with it for a lot of years... as I was saying about the time we worked the Band Box
